title: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
description: Table of per-county jury reporting status notices with no reliable per-row link; monitored by full-page fingerprint.

items.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
items.content_text:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.

What changed (text excerpt):
Added:
  + **July/August Traverse Jury** Will need to report for Jury Housekeeping on Wed July 8th at the time on your summons. Jurors #1-100 at 9am, Jurors #101-200 at 11am. Jury Selection will be held on Thurs July 9th at 8:30am. **Please note that August dates have changed: Housekeeping will be held on Wed Aug 5th at 9am (approx 1 hr), Jury Selection Thurs Aug 6th at 9am and Fri Aug 7th at 9am. Plan to appear unless the Clerk has told you that you do not need to report. Thank you.**
Removed:
  - **July/August Traverse Jury** Will need to report for Jury Housekeeping on Wed July 8th at the time on your summons. Jurors #1-100 at 9am, Jurors #101-200 at 11am. Jury Selection will be held on Thurs July 9th at 8:30am.

items.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Jury Status Notices
items.content_text:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt):
Added:
+ Jurors selected in the matter of State v Jordan are to report for trial at 9:00am on Monday July 6th. Please report to the Jury Assembly room on the second floor of the Cumberland County Courthouse in Portland.
+ All June 2026 trial jurors who have not been selected for the case mentioned previously are no longer expected to check this website or report for jury selection. Your jury service is now completed for 5 years with the thanks of the court!
Removed:
- Jurors selected in the matter of State v O’Donnell are no longer expected to report for trial on Tuesday, June 30th as the case has resolved.
- Jurors selected in the matter of State v Jordan are to check this website after 6:00PM on Thursday, July 2
- nd
- for reporting instructions for trial on Monday, July 6
- th
- .
- All June 2026 trial jurors who have not been selected for the cases mentioned previously are no longer expected to check this website or report for jury selection. Your jury service is now completed for 5 years with the thanks of the court!
